Localization.Description: Detecting the launch of the SharpHound (BloodHound) tool using one of the methods - ObjectProps, ACL, Trusts, Container.ObjectProps - performs Object Properties collection for properties such as LastLogon or PwdLastSet; ACL - collects abusable permissions on objects in Active Directory; Trusts - collects domain trusts; Container - collects OU tree structure and Group Policy links

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} launched the utility {object.process.name}, which behaves like SharpHound (BloodHound) software, to collect information from domain controller ({event_src.host})
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} performed activities similar to SharpHound (BloodHound) software activity to collect information from domain controller ({event_src.host})
